summary_en: ¥100/share (¥90 ordinary + ¥10 commemorative); prior ordinary dividend ¥90/share; total payout ¥1,049M; record date 2026-03-31; effective 2026-06-29. Commemorative dividend marking 70th anniversary.
title_en: Notice Regarding Dividend Payment (Implementation of Commemorative Dividend)
translation_en_brief: Matsuoka Corporation announced on 14 May 2026 a dividend of ¥100 per share for the fiscal year ending 31 March 2026, comprising ¥90 ordinary dividend and ¥10 commemorative dividend. The ordinary dividend matches the prior forecast announced 13 May 2025 and equals the prior year's payout. Total dividend payment is ¥1,049 million. The record date is 31 March 2026 with an effective date of 29 June 2026. The company stated its basic dividend policy targets a consolidated payout ratio of approximately 30% for FY3/26, balancing shareholder returns with internal reserves for new investment and financial stability. The additional ¥10 commemorative dividend marks the company's 70th anniversary, expressed as gratitude to shareholders and other stakeholders for their long-term support.
